title: Operation Callahan
subtitle: Kilian's 8th birthday at Cedar Point

team.note: Grandparents, Mom, Dad, and the birthday boy. Kilian just cleared 51 inches, so the big coasters are finally on the table.

bring: Wrapped gifts hidden in a bag Kilian won't dig into
The 'it's my day' birthday shirt for Friday, plus candles and a lighter
Small park bag only (8 x 12 x 4 in, or rent a locker) and SPF 50
Refillable water bottles and Ziplocs for phones on the water rides
Broken-in shoes for 10-plus miles of walking
Hoodies and long sleeves for the mid-50s campground nights
Swimsuits, a packable rain poncho, and a portable battery
Cash and one credit card (ride lockers are credit-only)
Groceries and a firewood plan for the cabin, and the s'mores kit

bookings.title: Sandusky Bayshore KOA, deluxe cabin
bookings.note: Cabin has the kitchen, linens, and towels. No tent, no bedding needed.

bookings.title: Cedar Point tickets and Fast Lane
bookings.note: Pre-buy and scan on the cabin wifi Thursday night, not in a dead-zone line at the gate.

bookings.title: Birthday cupcakes near Sandusky
bookings.note: Bake-ahead or grab them Thursday evening for a campsite candle moment.

lists.title: Kilian's ride list
lists.note: At 51 inches he clears the whole 48-inch tier. Hit these before the lines build.
items: Magnum XL-200, the legendary hyper coaster
Valravn, the B and M dive coaster
Siren's Curse, the new tilt coaster
Gemini or Blue Streak for a classic

items.text: Giant Wheel over Lake Erie at sunset

lists.title: Bonus wins
lists.note: Would be awesome if the day and the legs cooperate.
items: Get soaked on Snake River Falls and Thunder Canyon
Wilderness Run kids' coaster in Camp Snoopy
S'mores and the jumping pillow back at the KOA

notes: Thursday is the wind day, gusts to 37 on I-90. The deluxe cabin means you just unload and settle in.
Cedar Point ride lockers are credit-only. Keep a real card on the lead adult.
Lost-kid plan: a morning photo of Kilian's outfit, your number in his pocket, and a meetup landmark.
Bring drinking water. Reviews ding the KOA tap.
Nearest ER is Firelands Regional Medical Center on Hayes Ave, about 10 minutes from the cabin.
closingNote: Home safe. Happy 8th, bud. You're gonna remember this one.

places.name: Das Dutchman Essenhaus
places.desc: Amish family-style and pie in Middlebury, Indiana.

places.name: Tony Packo's
places.desc: Famous Hungarian hot dogs in Toledo.

places.name: Sandusky Bayshore KOA
places.desc: Deluxe cabin, a mile east of the park. Jumping pillow, gem mine, fire pit.

places.name: Cedar Point
places.desc: 18 coasters on a Lake Erie peninsula. Gates typically open 10am.

places.name: Firelands Regional ER
places.desc: Nearest emergency room, Hayes Ave. Map it before you need it.

days.title: Travel and cabin
notes: Buy and scan tickets plus Fast Lane on the cabin wifi tonight.

schedule.title: Roll out of Colgate
schedule.note: 1pm Central. Windy, expect crosswinds on I-90 by the lake.

schedule.title: Lunch at Das Dutchman Essenhaus
schedule.note: Family-style and a slice of pie to break up the drive.

schedule.title: Check in at the KOA cabin
schedule.note: Long haul with the time change. Unload, light the fire pit, cupcakes and candles for the birthday-eve.

days.title: Birthday at Cedar Point
notes: Rope-drop the coasters, retreat to Camp Snoopy and the water rides for the hot midday, save the Giant Wheel for a birthday-evening photo.

schedule.title: Birthday breakfast at the cabin
schedule.note: It's-my-day shirt on. Presents before the park.

schedule.title: Gates and the free birthday button
schedule.note: Ask Guest Services for the It's My Birthday button. Photo at the front sign first.

schedule.title: Rope-drop the big coasters
schedule.note: Magnum, Valravn, and Siren's Curse before the lines build.

schedule.title: Camp Snoopy and the water rides
schedule.note: Hot midday. Ziploc the phones for Snake River Falls and Thunder Canyon.

schedule.title: Giant Wheel at golden hour
schedule.note: Birthday photo over Lake Erie to close it out.

days.title: Drive home
notes: Slight storm chance after 2pm, so get on the road in the morning and beat it.

schedule.title: Lunch at Tony Packo's, Toledo
schedule.note: Hungarian dogs on the way out of Ohio.

schedule.title: Drive home to Colgate
schedule.note: About 4 more hours, plus the hour back to Central time.
